name: Soba Noodles
recipeIngredient: optional garnishes: green onions, sesame seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the soba noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Rinse the cooked noodles in cold water and drain well on a strainer or mat.
3. Prepare the dipping sauce by combining seaweed stock, dark soy sauce, mirin, sugar, and salt in a small pot.
4. Simmer the sauce over low heat until it thickens slightly.
5. Serve the soba noodles with the dipping sauce, garnished with green onions or sesame seeds if desired. Enjoy!
